fixes_applied.issue: Missing os.makedirs for metrics_dir and figures_dir in orchestrator — would crash at runtime
fixes_applied.fix: Added os.makedirs with exist_ok=True for both output directories

fixes_applied.issue: Unreachable else branch in error analysis failure mode classification
fixes_applied.fix: Removed dead else branch, simplified to elif/else

advisories.note: compute_by_difficulty defaults to 0.0 for missing tiers — acceptable for experiment
np.random.RandomState is legacy — works correctly, not worth migrating for experiment
Bootstrap metric closures rebuild lookups per resample — performance impact acceptable at experiment scale
Variable naming: best_emb is actually first embedding — misleading but functionally correct
Seaborn import fallback is silent — seaborn is in deps so should always be available
Missing tests for evaluate_all, compute_by_difficulty, mcnemar_test — core metrics are well-tested
Similarity gap defaults to 0.0 when no gaps — unlikely edge case with top-10 results
